module_info.docstring:
Batch scorer for interbench runs.

Scores multiple runs matching a filter, useful for:
- Scoring all runs from a specific tool
- Re-scoring after changing evaluation criteria
- Building up training data

Usage:
    # Score all tldrs runs
    ./scripts/score_batch.py --tool tldrs

    # Score recent runs
    ./scripts/score_batch.py --limit 10

    # Score runs matching metadata
    ./scripts/score_batch.py --meta command=context

    # Score unscored runs only
    ./scripts/score_batch.py --unscored-only

Environment:
    INTERBENCH_HOME - interbench data directory (default: ~/.interbench)
